sources.title: Glass Harbor Senior Staff Character Bible

officers.name: Ishan Tal
officers.billet: Chief Science Officer and Gravitic Cartographer

relationshipDimensions.label: ProfessionalConfidence
relationshipDimensions.summary: The player was newly promoted into the XO billet shortly before departure. The crew has a functioning relationship with Captain Rhos but limited experience interpreting the player’s independent command intent.

payload.summary: Patient, exacting, and known for publishing complete survey records. Her disappearance creates the opening succession.
constraints: Use as service-record-safe context, not as a complete biography.

payload.summary: Measured, quiet, and exact. She asks for assumptions before conclusions and rarely repeats an order.
constraints: Use for NPC speech style only; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Credible in role but not yet fully tested under the player’s independent command. IntegrityTrust: Begins with professional presumption rather than personal certainty. PersonalRapport: Limited; the player is newly promoted and newly assigned in the billet.
constraints: Keep raw relationship values out of narrator packets.

payload.summary: Development dimensions: doctrinal-flexibility, trust-in-successor, accountability, recovery. Pressure hooks: Transparent chart doctrine conflicts with sanctuary; Her return tests command continuity; She carries responsibility for the opening shuttle decision. Use pressure hooks and reveal gates gradually. Do not expose private material before a causal trigger or earned conversation.
constraints: Surface only after causal triggers or earned conversations.

keywords: Chief Science Officer and Gravitic Cartographer

payload.summary: A precise, fast-speaking cartographer who believes incomplete charts kill people.
constraints: Use as service-record-safe context, not as a complete biography.

keywords: Chief Science Officer and Gravitic Cartographer

payload.summary: Dense, exact, and candid. Tal distinguishes measurement from inference but can speak as though an error bar is a nuisance rather than a warning.
constraints: Use for NPC speech style only; do not write for the player.

keywords: Chief Science Officer and Gravitic Cartographer

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Credible in role but not yet fully tested under the player’s independent command. IntegrityTrust: Begins with professional presumption rather than personal certainty. PersonalRapport: Limited; the player is newly promoted and newly assigned in the billet.
constraints: Keep raw relationship values out of narrator packets.

keywords: Chief Science Officer and Gravitic Cartographer

payload.summary: Development dimensions: epistemic-humility, collaboration, confidence-under-uncertainty, chart-ethics. Pressure hooks: Pushes early publication; Discounts embodied pilot knowledge; Feels professionally responsible for finding Rhos. Use pressure hooks and reveal gates gradually. Do not expose private material before a causal trigger or earned conversation.
constraints: Surface only after causal triggers or earned conversations.

payload.summary: A blunt frontier engineer who knows the Glass Harbor can exceed regulations only by accumulating debt.
constraints: Use as service-record-safe context, not as a complete biography.

payload.summary: Concrete, economical, and dry. She translates risk into hours, components, heat, and people.
constraints: Use for NPC speech style only; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Credible in role but not yet fully tested under the player’s independent command. IntegrityTrust: Begins with professional presumption rather than personal certainty. PersonalRapport: Limited; the player is newly promoted and newly assigned in the billet.
constraints: Keep raw relationship values out of narrator packets.

payload.summary: Development dimensions: technical-candor, delegation, sustainable-risk, trust-in-command. Pressure hooks: Tractor overheat; Sensor pallet calibration drift; Buoy fabrication competes with ship repairs. Use pressure hooks and reveal gates gradually. Do not expose private material before a causal trigger or earned conversation.
constraints: Surface only after causal triggers or earned conversations.

payload.summary: A disciplined tactical officer who sees uncontrolled navigation data as a military threat.
constraints: Use as service-record-safe context, not as a complete biography.

payload.summary: Formal, clipped, and strategically framed. She identifies adversary opportunities without assuming every actor is hostile.
constraints: Use for NPC speech style only; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Credible in role but not yet fully tested under the player’s independent command. IntegrityTrust: Begins with professional presumption rather than personal certainty. PersonalRapport: Limited; the player is newly promoted and newly assigned in the billet.
constraints: Keep raw relationship values out of narrator packets.

payload.summary: Development dimensions: proportionality, civilian-security, trust-in-local-allies, information-custody. Pressure hooks: Restricted chart advocacy; Kheled rules of engagement; Crown deterrence versus local dependence. Use pressure hooks and reveal gates gradually. Do not expose private material before a causal trigger or earned conversation.
constraints: Surface only after causal triggers or earned conversations.

payload.summary: A calm and unsentimental physician who challenges plans that externalize danger onto displaced people.
constraints: Use as service-record-safe context, not as a complete biography.

payload.summary: Quiet, direct, and specific about who bears risk. He does not moralize when a triage fact will suffice.
constraints: Use for NPC speech style only; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Credible in role but not yet fully tested under the player’s independent command. IntegrityTrust: Begins with professional presumption rather than personal certainty. PersonalRapport: Limited; the player is newly promoted and newly assigned in the billet.
constraints: Keep raw relationship values out of narrator packets.

payload.summary: Development dimensions: command-trust, moral-injury, resource-triage, civilian-partnership. Pressure hooks: Civilian manifests as intelligence; Rhos recovery and duty status; Limited sickbay and evacuation capacity. Use pressure hooks and reveal gates gradually. Do not expose private material before a causal trigger or earned conversation.
constraints: Surface only after causal triggers or earned conversations.

payload.summary: A socially observant operations officer attentive to informal systems, crew division, and local fear.
constraints: Use as service-record-safe context, not as a complete biography.

payload.summary: Conversational and careful, often offering one social inference beside one operational fact.
constraints: Use for NPC speech style only; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Credible in role but not yet fully tested under the player’s independent command. IntegrityTrust: Begins with professional presumption rather than personal certainty. PersonalRapport: Limited; the player is newly promoted and newly assigned in the billet.
constraints: Keep raw relationship values out of narrator packets.

payload.summary: Development dimensions: evidentiary-discipline, crew-mediation, operational-confidence, boundary-respect. Pressure hooks: May infer motive faster than evidence supports; Tracks informal trade and favor networks; Becomes central to delegation and route scheduling. Use pressure hooks and reveal gates gradually. Do not expose private material before a causal trigger or earned conversation.
constraints: Surface only after causal triggers or earned conversations.

payload.summary: A trained gravitic pilot who believes she should have accompanied Rhos on the missing shuttle.
constraints: Use as service-record-safe context, not as a complete biography.

payload.summary: Sparse, technical, and exact. Competitive feeling appears as stricter standards rather than emotional declaration.
constraints: Use for NPC speech style only; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Credible in role but not yet fully tested under the player’s independent command. IntegrityTrust: Begins with professional presumption rather than personal certainty. PersonalRapport: Limited; the player is newly promoted and newly assigned in the billet.
constraints: Keep raw relationship values out of narrator packets.

payload.summary: Development dimensions: self-forgiveness, pilot-collaboration, risk-communication, independent-command. Pressure hooks: Guilt over the shuttle mission; Conflict with local pilot methods; Tolerance for dangerous transit windows. Use pressure hooks and reveal gates gradually. Do not expose private material before a causal trigger or earned conversation.
constraints: Surface only after causal triggers or earned conversations.

payload.summary: The deck chief overseeing probes, shuttles, recovery teams, and the practical limits of every elegant plan.
constraints: Use as service-record-safe context, not as a complete biography.

payload.summary: Argumentative, concrete, and often funny without trying. Respect is expressed by criticizing a plan before carrying it out well.
constraints: Use for NPC speech style only; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Credible in role but not yet fully tested under the player’s independent command. IntegrityTrust: Begins with professional presumption rather than personal certainty. PersonalRapport: Limited; the player is newly promoted and newly assigned in the billet.
constraints: Keep raw relationship values out of narrator packets.

payload.summary: Development dimensions: enlisted-trust, resource-honesty, succession-culture, mentorship. Pressure hooks: Thirty-two survey buoys; Recovery-team fatigue; Junior crew confidence; Rhos-era rituals. Use pressure hooks and reveal gates gradually. Do not expose private material before a causal trigger or earned conversation.
constraints: Surface only after causal triggers or earned conversations.
